name: Pineapple Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pineapple, coriander, onion, and chilies into a blender. Set the speed to low and blend for a few seconds.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and blend for an additional 10 seconds.
3. Pour the mixture into a glass bowl, cover, and chill in the refrigerator for one day.
When serving, you may garnish with either sliced spring onions or chopped mint leaves.
Use small Thai "rat-poo" chilies, about 1 1/2 inches long. Chop finely before adding to the blender. Do not use canned pineapple; it will not work.
